messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Build a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Holiday Sales Projection' for regional retail managers. The deck needs 14 slides utilizing a festive red and gold theme with seasonal imagery placeholders. All content must be written in English and the slide size should be set to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the final document as holiday_sales.pptx. External APIs or web scraping are strictly forbidden. For any charts included, you must use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart. Also, ensure that any attempt to set text on a title shape first checks if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os

# ── Deck Constants ──────────────────────────────────────────────
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(10)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(5.625)
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.6)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.6)
CONTENT_TOP = Inches(0.4)
CONTENT_BOTTOM = Inches(0.3)

COLOR_DEEP_RED = RGBColor(139, 0, 0)
COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD = RGBColor(212, 175, 55)
COLOR_CREAM_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 248, 231)
COLOR_CHARCOAL = RGBColor(44, 44, 44)
COLOR_BURGUNDY = RGBColor(165, 42, 42)
COLOR_SOFT_GOLD = RGBColor(245, 222, 179)
COLOR_WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(230, 230, 230)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Aptos"
FONT_SECONDARY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"


def hex_to_rgb(color_input):
    if isinstance(color_input, RGBColor):
        return color_input
    h = color_input.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


# ── Helper Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────

def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=None, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    if color:
        run.font.color.rgb = color
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, title=None, body=None, bg_color=COLOR_CREAM_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
    shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    if title:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=13, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    if body:
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.5), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.65), body, font_size=11, color=COLOR_CHARCOAL)
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, left, top, text, font_size=28):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(9), Inches(0.6), text, font_size=font_size, bold=True, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def add_footer(slide, slide_num, total=14):
    footer_text = f"Holiday Sales Projection | Slide {slide_num} of {total}"
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(5.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.3), footer_text, font_size=9, color=COLOR_BURGUNDY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_LIGHT_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD
        shape.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.1), top + Inches(0.15), width - Inches(0.2), height - Inches(0.3), "Seasonal Image Placeholder", font_size=11, color=COLOR_BURGUNDY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def add_decorative_line(slide, left, top, width, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, Inches(0.04))
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = color
    shape.line.fill.background()


def add_bullet_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, items, font_size=12):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        if i == 0:
            p = tf.paragraphs[0]
        else:
            p = tf.add_paragraph()
        p.space_after = Pt(6)
        run = p.add_run()
        run.text = f"• {item}"
        run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
        run.font.color.rgb = COLOR_CHARCOAL
    return txBox


# ── Slide Builders ──────────────────────────────────────────────

def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#8B0000")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.2), Inches(7), Inches(1.2), "Holiday Sales Projection", font_size=44, bold=True, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.6), Inches(3))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(7), Inches(0.8), "Regional Retail Performance & Forecast FY 2024–2025", font_size=22, color=COLOR_CREAM_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.9), Inches(7), Inches(0.6), "Prepared for Regional Retail Managers", font_size=14, color=COLOR_SOFT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_2_executive_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Executive Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Executive Summary", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    metrics = [
        ("Revenue Target", "$48.5M", "FY 2025 Holiday Season"),
        ("YoY Growth", "+12.3%", "Above Industry Average"),
        ("Store Count", "1,247", "Across All Regions"),
        ("Avg Transaction", "$67.80", "+$4.20 vs Last Year"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(4.2)
    card_h = Inches(1.35)
    gap = Inches(0.2)
    for i, (title, value, desc) in enumerate(metrics):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + col * (card_w + gap)
        top = Inches(1.35) + row * (card_h + gap)
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title=title, body=f"{value}\n{desc}", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def slide_3_market_overview(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Market Overview"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Market Overview", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    bullets = [
        "Holiday retail sales expected to reach $974B nationally (+5.2% YoY)",
        "E-commerce share growing to 22% of total holiday spend",
        "In-store experience remains critical for premium segments",
        "Gift cards and experiential purchases trending upward",
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4.8), Inches(2.5), bullets)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["E-Commerce", "In-Store", "Omnichannel"]
    chart_data.add_series("Channel Mix", (22, 61, 17))
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(5.8), Inches(1.35), Inches(3.4), Inches(2.8), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.number_format = "0%"

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/holiday_market.jpg", Inches(5.8), Inches(4.3), Inches(3.4), Inches(0.9))


def slide_4_historical_performance(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Historical Performance"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Historical Performance", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Nov 1–15", "Nov 16–30", "Dec 1–15", "Dec 16–24"]
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2022 ($M)", (8.2, 9.1, 10.5, 12.8))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2023 ($M)", (9.4, 10.6, 12.1, 14.7))
    chart_data.add_series("FY 2024 ($M)", (10.8, 12.3, 14.0, 16.5))
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(8.8), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.95), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.25), "Source: Internal Sales Analytics | All figures in millions USD", font_size=10, color=COLOR_BURGUNDY)


def slide_5_regional_breakdown(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Regional Breakdown"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Regional Breakdown", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Northeast", "Southeast", "Midwest", "West"]
    chart_data.add_series("Projected Revenue ($M)", (14.2, 11.8, 10.5, 12.0))
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_DEEP_RED

    insights = [
        "Northeast leads with 29% of total revenue",
        "Southeast showing strongest growth trajectory (+18%)",
        "West region outperforming targets by 7%",
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.35), Inches(3.4), Inches(2.0), insights)

    add_image_or_placeholder(slide, "assets/regional_map.jpg", Inches(6.3), Inches(3.7), Inches(3.4), Inches(1.2))


def slide_6_product_categories(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Product Category Analysis"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Product Category Analysis", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Electronics", "Apparel", "Home & Garden", "Toys", "Grocery"]
    chart_data.add_series("Q4 Revenue ($M)", (12.5, 9.8, 7.2, 8.6, 10.4))
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_STACKED, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(5.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.fill.solid()
    series.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD

    insights = [
        "Electronics remains top category at 26%",
        "Toys and Games up 15% YoY",
        "Home & Garden strong in Q4 seasonal demand",
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, Inches(6.3), Inches(1.35), Inches(3.4), Inches(2.0), insights)


def slide_7_promotional_strategy(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Promotional Strategy"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Promotional Strategy", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    promos = [
        ("Black Friday", "Nov 29", "40% off select items\nTarget: $8.5M revenue"),
        ("Cyber Monday", "Dec 2", "Online exclusives\nTarget: $6.2M revenue"),
        ("Holiday Season", "Dec 3–24", "Gift bundles & loyalty rewards\nTarget: $24.0M revenue"),
        ("New Year's Sale", "Dec 26–Jan 1", "Clearance + New Arrivals\nTarget: $9.8M revenue"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.05)
    card_h = Inches(2.4)
    gap = Inches(0.15)
    for i, (title, date, desc) in enumerate(promos):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + gap)
        top = Inches(1.35)
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title=title, body=f"{date}\n{desc}", bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def slide_8_budget_allocation(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Budget Allocation"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Budget Allocation", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Digital Ads", "In-Store Displays", "Email Marketing", "Social Media", "PR & Events"]
    chart_data.add_series("Marketing Spend ($M)", (4.2, 2.8, 1.5, 3.1, 1.9))
    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(4.5), Inches(3.5), chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(5.5), Inches(1.35), Inches(4.0), Inches(2.0), "Total Marketing Budget: $13.5M\nDigital-first approach with 68% allocated to online channels.\nROI target: 4.2x across all campaigns.", font_size=12, color=COLOR_CHARCOAL)


def slide_9_customer_insights(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Customer Insights"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Customer Insights", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    insights = [
        ("Demographics", "Primary: Ages 25–44 (42%)\nSecondary: Ages 45–60 (28%)\nGen Z growing at +22% YoY"),
        ("Shopping Behavior", "73% research online before buying\nAverage 4.2 store visits per purchase\nMobile checkout up 31%"),
        ("Loyalty Trends", "Rewards members spend 2.5x more\nReferral program drove 18k new signups\nNPS score: 72 (industry avg: 60)"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(3.0)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(insights):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + gap)
        top = Inches(1.35)
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title=title, body=body, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def slide_10_risk_factors(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Factors & Mitigation"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Risk Factors & Mitigation", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    risks = [
        ("Supply Chain Delays", "Diversify suppliers; maintain 4-week buffer stock for top SKUs"),
        ("Weather Disruptions", "Flexible staffing plans; activate online fulfillment surge capacity"),
        ("Competitive Pressure", "Differentiate via exclusive bundles and loyalty perks"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap = Inches(0.2)
    for i, (title, body) in enumerate(risks):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + gap)
        top = Inches(1.35)
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title=title, body=body, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_BURGUNDY)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(4.2), Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Mitigation strategies reviewed and approved by regional leadership team.", font_size=11, color=COLOR_BURGUNDY)


def slide_11_action_items(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Action Items"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Action Items", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    actions = [
        "Finalize regional inventory allocation by October 15",
        "Complete staff training on holiday promotions by November 1",
        "Launch Black Friday digital campaign by November 20",
        "Activate store visual merchandising standards by November 25",
        "Monitor daily sales dashboards and adjust tactics weekly",
        "Conduct post-holiday review meeting in January 2026",
    ]
    add_bullet_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.35), Inches(8.8), Inches(3.5), actions)


def slide_12_timeline(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Timeline & Milestones"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Timeline & Milestones", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    milestones = [
        ("October 1", "Inventory Planning\nFinalize stock levels"),
        ("November 15", "Campaign Launch\nDigital & in-store prep"),
        ("November 29", "Black Friday\nPeak traffic day"),
        ("December 24", "Holiday Peak\nLast shipping day"),
        ("January 31", "Post-Holiday Review\nAnalysis complete"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(1.6)
    card_h = Inches(2.0)
    gap = Inches(0.15)
    for i, (date, desc) in enumerate(milestones):
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + i * (card_w + gap)
        top = Inches(1.35)
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title=date, body=desc, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def slide_13_financial_summary(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, COLOR_CREAM_WHITE)
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Financial Summary"
    else:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.6), CONTENT_TOP, Inches(8.8), Inches(0.5), "Financial Summary", font_size=28, bold=True, color=COLOR_DEEP_RED)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(0.6), Inches(1.0), Inches(3))

    kpis = [
        ("Total Revenue Target", "$48.5M"),
        ("Gross Margin", "38.2%"),
        ("Marketing Spend", "$13.5M (27.8%)"),
        ("Net Profit Projection", "$6.8M"),
        ("Inventory Turnover", "4.1x"),
        ("Customer Acquisition Cost", "$23.40"),
    ]
    card_w = Inches(2.8)
    card_h = Inches(1.5)
    gap = Inches(0.25)
    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(kpis):
        col = i % 2
        row = i // 2
        left = MARGIN_LEFT + col * (card_w + gap)
        top = Inches(1.35) + row * (card_h + gap)
        add_card(slide, left, top, card_w, card_h, title=label, body=value, bg_color=COLOR_WHITE, border_color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD)


def slide_14_closing(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#8B0000")
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5), Inches(7), Inches(1.2), "Thank You", font_size=48, bold=True, color=COLOR_FESTIVE_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_decorative_line(slide, Inches(3.5), Inches(2.9), Inches(3))
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.6), "Questions & Discussion", font_size=24, color=COLOR_CREAM_WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.2), Inches(7), Inches(0.8), "Contact: sales.planning@company.com\nRegional Sales Division | Holiday Season 2024–2025", font_size=13, color=COLOR_SOFT_GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# ── Main ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_executive_summary(prs)
    slide_3_market_overview(prs)
    slide_4_historical_performance(prs)
    slide_5_regional_breakdown(prs)
    slide_6_product_categories(prs)
    slide_7_promotional_strategy(prs)
    slide_8_budget_allocation(prs)
    slide_9_customer_insights(prs)
    slide_10_risk_factors(prs)
    slide_11_action_items(prs)
    slide_12_timeline(prs)
    slide_13_financial_summary(prs)
    slide_14_closing(prs)

    prs.save("holiday_sales.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
